subcodes.first_line: O thou who proclaimest My Cause and gazest upon My countenance! We desired to make mention of thee and have thus made mention of thee in this Most Glorious Tablet, that thou mayest give thanks [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مبلغ امری و الناظر الی وجهی انا اردنا ذکرک ذکرناک بهذا اللوح الابهی لتشکر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @thankfulness; gratitude
